input: user-item interaction graphs from multiple domains (each domain as a federated client)
output: ranked item recommendations per user across domains
backbone: graph neural network (GNN) encoder with differential privacy on aggregation layers
loss: BPR loss + consistency loss (local-global representation invariance)
key_idea: federated transfer learning with differential privacy on GNN aggregation outputs to protect user representations while enabling cross-domain knowledge transfer via latent overlapping user detection
